name: GIGABYTE B760M DS3H AX Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-7600(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - HDMI 2.0 - DisplayPort 1.2 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax
shortName: GIGABYTE B760M DS3H AX Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR5 support and Wi-Fi 6E.
